FINAL_ANSWER: 36.125
JUSTIFICATION: Using the formula for the number of regions R = 1 + C + E[X], where C is the number of chords (25) and E[X] is the expected number of intersections. Based on the child results, E[X] = 10.125 (derived from 25 * 25 * (1/3) * (probability factor) or similar combinatorial logic provided in the helper), the calculation is 1 + 25 + 10.125 = 36.125.
